english: Guangdong; a province in southern China

etymology.description: 廣(廣) (guǎng, "broad; wide") 拼音(拼音) (dōng, "east")
etymology.interpretation: 廣(廣) (guǎng, "broad; wide"), depicting a large expanse, represents the vastness of the region. 東(東) (dōng, "east") indicates its geographical location trending towards the eastern part of the southern area. Combined, 廣東(廣東) (Guǎngdōng) denotes a place that is broad and situated in the east, specifically referring to Guangdong province which historically emphasized its wide coastal plains in the eastern part of the south of China.

examples.chinese: 廣東是中國的一個省(廣東是中國的一個省)。
examples.pinyin: Guǎngdōng shì Zhōngguó de yī gè shěng.
examples.english: Guangdong is a province of China.

examples.chinese: 廣東的飲食文化非常有名(廣東的飲食文化非常有名)。
examples.pinyin: Guǎngdōng de yǐnshí wénhuà fēicháng yǒumíng.
examples.english: The food culture of Guangdong is very famous.

examples.chinese: 他們打算去廣東旅行(他們打算去廣東旅行)。
examples.english: They plan to travel to Guangdong.
